evals.prompt: Create a dark-mode infographic showing a startup's funding timeline. Company: NovaPay. Milestones: Jan 2020 — Founded, $0. Mar 2021 — Pre-seed, $500K from angel investors. Nov 2021 — Seed, $3.2M led by Sequoia. Aug 2022 — Series A, $18M led by a16z. Feb 2024 — Series B, $55M led by Tiger Global. Format it for LinkedIn.
evals.expected_output: A single self-contained HTML file containing a dark-background timeline infographic. All 5 milestones with exact dates and dollar amounts present. LinkedIn dimensions (1200x627px). No fabricated data.
assertions: An HTML file is produced containing the infographic
All five funding milestones are present: Founded ($0), Pre-seed ($500K), Seed ($3.2M), Series A ($18M), Series B ($55M)
All five dates/periods are represented: Jan 2020, Mar 2021, Nov 2021, Aug 2022, Feb 2024
All three investor names appear: Sequoia, a16z, Tiger Global (attributed to the correct rounds)
The infographic uses a dark background (dark mode default when not specified otherwise)
The design uses a distinctive display font — NOT Inter, Roboto, Arial, or Helvetica as the heading/display font
Phosphor Icons CDN script is included in the HTML
No dollar amounts, percentages, or statistics appear that were not provided in the prompt (no fabricated data)

evals.prompt: Make a token economics infographic for our DeFi project 'ArcDAO'. Token: ARC. Total supply: 1,000,000,000. Allocation: Team 15%, Investors 20%, Community Rewards 35%, Treasury 20%, Liquidity 10%. Brand color: #7C3AED (purple). Make it feel premium and crypto-native.
evals.expected_output: A self-contained HTML infographic with a donut/pie chart or visual breakdown showing the 5 token allocations with exact percentages. Brand color #7C3AED drives the palette. Crypto-native dark aesthetic.
assertions: An HTML file is produced containing the infographic
All five allocation categories are present: Team (15%), Investors (20%), Community Rewards (35%), Treasury (20%), Liquidity (10%)
The total supply '1,000,000,000' or '1B' appears in the infographic
The brand color #7C3AED (purple) or a close approximation is used as the primary accent color
The token name 'ARC' and project name 'ArcDAO' both appear in the infographic
The five percentages sum to 100% visually (chart or table representation is complete and internally consistent)
No allocation percentages, amounts, or vesting terms appear that were not provided in the prompt (no fabricated data)
The design uses a distinctive display font — NOT Inter, Roboto, Arial, or Helvetica as the heading/display font

evals.prompt: I need a shareable infographic summarizing global remote work stats for 2024. Data: 16% of companies are fully remote worldwide. 62% of workers aged 22-65 work remotely at least occasionally. Top reasons people prefer remote: No commute 73%, Flexible schedule 68%, Better work-life balance 61%, Cost savings 42%. Productivity: 77% of remote workers report being more productive. Challenges: 20% struggle with loneliness, 17% with collaboration, 15% with communication. Use a professional dark look.
evals.expected_output: A dark-themed HTML infographic summarizing the remote work stats. All statistics faithfully reproduced. Data-story archetype with clear stat hierarchy.
assertions: An HTML file is produced containing the infographic
The top-level stats are present: 16% (fully remote companies), 62% (workers remote at least occasionally), 77% (productivity improvement)
All four remote preference reasons with correct percentages: No commute 73%, Flexible schedule 68%, Better work-life balance 61%, Cost savings 42%
All three challenge stats with correct percentages: Loneliness 20%, Collaboration 17%, Communication 15%
The background is dark (dark mode)
The design uses a distinctive display font — NOT Inter, Roboto, Arial, or Helvetica as the heading/display font
Phosphor Icons CDN script is included in the HTML
No statistics, percentages, or figures appear that were not provided in the prompt (no fabricated data or rounding)
